description: Phase 3 receipt — all 5 modules selected (Booking, Enquiry, Newsletter, Offers, GBP), no founding member (locked 2026-05-25 prices)

values.moduleList:
• Site + hosting
  • Online booking (Cal.com integration with your branding)
  • Enquiry form (emails hit your inbox without exposing your address)
  • Newsletter (send up to 1000 emails/month from name@yourdomain)
  • Offers (a promotional strip on your homepage — set a headline, dates and CTA from your dashboard)
  • Google Business Profile setup + live reviews on your site (I'll claim your listing, embed it, and refresh your top reviews automatically)

expected.subject: Got your details — here's your quote
expected.body:
Hi Sam,

Thanks for filling that in — here's your quote.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

YOUR PACKAGE
  • Site + hosting
  • Online booking (Cal.com integration with your branding)
  • Enquiry form (emails hit your inbox without exposing your address)
  • Newsletter (send up to 1000 emails/month from name@yourdomain)
  • Offers (a promotional strip on your homepage — set a headline, dates and CTA from your dashboard)
  • Google Business Profile setup + live reviews on your site (I'll claim your listing, embed it, and refresh your top reviews automatically)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PRICING
  Setup (one-off):  £464
  Monthly:          £59/mo

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT
  1. Pay — you'll see the payment page now
  2. Onboarding hub — a short checklist (~30 min) to
     set up your domain, upload photos, and pick a
     launch date
  3. We build — hosting, SSL, custom email, and the
     site itself are all handled for you
  4. Go live — you'll get an email at every step so
     you always know where things stand

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Questions? Just reply to this email.

— ModuForge
